prestazioni: Lingenfelter 3.6L LF4 (engine code) twin-turbo upgrade with Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA billet wheel turbos (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) running 22 psi on a custom cast manifold with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve, supporting 750+ WHP on E85 with upgraded fuel system (Fore Innovations 450 LPH dual-pump setup, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator)

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: RPM Transmissions Level 4 built 8L90 transmission with billet torque converter, upgraded clutch packs, and reinforced valve body; G-Force GSR differential with 3.91 final drive ratio and carbon fiber driveshaft; and C&R Racing triple-pass intercooler with 1,200 CFM cooling capacity

Suspension overhaul with JRi Control Rods double-adjustable coilovers (24-way compression, 24-way rebound damping), Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in front and 1,000 lb/in rear springs, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and Hardrace adjustable camber plates with spherical bearings for -3.5° front and -2.8° rear alignment
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (ATS-V specific, 3-piece front fenders, 2-piece rear quarter panels, and custom carbon fiber rear diffuser) with custom matte PPF wrap in BBS LM finish (19x10.5 +35 front, 19x12 +45 rear) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 305/30/19 rear)

Aero Function carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed titanium mounting brackets) and custom 3-piece carbon fiber rear wing (adjustable angle of attack via hydraulic actuators) with Gurney flap, paired with a full carbon fiber hood (VIS Racing with heat extractors for LF4 turbos)

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats (Sparco 6-point harnesses), custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, TIG-welded with gusseted joints) wrapped in Alcantara, and a MoTeC C127 dash logger with integrated AIM Solo 2 DL GPS data acquisition system (mounted on a custom CNC-machined aluminum dash panel)
